content.question: The exact current number of sub-2,000-population village primary schools closed, consolidated, or transferred to church maintenance per year is unknown; no consolidated national dataset was located for this specific rural-closure metric.
content.reduction_path: National or regional audit report from the Ministry of Human Resources / KLIK on school closures, consolidations, and church transfers for 2020–2025 by municipality size and school-district; longitudinal enrolment data linked to closure decisions.
